title: Client Onboarding Checklist for Independent Consultants
description: Solo consultants starting a new engagement get a repeatable 30-step checklist covering intake forms, tool access, stakeholder intros, and deliverable alignment to eliminate chaotic project kickoffs.
gumroad_description:
Your first week with a new client shouldn't feel like herding cats through a spreadsheet.

This checklist stops the chaos before it starts. Twenty battle-tested steps cover everything from intake forms and tool access to stakeholder intros and deliverable alignment—the exact moves that separate smooth kickoffs from projects that limp along for months.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Fractional consultants juggling multiple clients who need to standardize their onboarding process
— Solo service providers tired of repeating the same ad-hoc questions across every new engagement
— Independent advisors who know a good kickoff prevents scope creep and keeps clients aligned

WHAT'S INSIDE

— Step-by-step checklist in both readable Markdown and structured JSON for your own tools
— Clear context for every item so you understand the why, not just the what
— Real situations you'll face: access requests that get lost, stakeholders who don't know each other, misaligned expectations about deliverables
— A repeatable system you can customize and reuse across every client relationship

Stop improvising your client kickoffs. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
